name: P-Nutty Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 450°F. Place paper liners in muffin tin, set aside.
Combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a medium bowl. Toss to blend with fork. Set aside.
Peel banana, break into small pieces, and set it aside on wax paper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine peanut butter and sugar. Mix at medium speed until blended. Stop when necessary to scrape sides of the bowl with a rubber scraper.
Add eggs and mix. Add banana and mix. Add flour mixture in two stages and mix until completely incorporated. Do not overmix. Add sour cream and mix.
Spoon batter into muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full. With mittened hands, carefully place the pan in the oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Turn off the oven and with mittened hands, carefully remove the muffin pan and set it on a cooling rack for 10 minutes. With your mitts on, carefully tip the tin to one side to let the muffins fall out.
If there is a stubborn muffin, use a table knife to loosen it. Once the muffins are completely cool, wrap them in plastic wrap and freeze. Makes 12 muffins.
